eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Los Angeles, CA; at 11:01 PM ON APR 25, 2026 Effective until 01:01 AM APR 26, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
AN AMBER ALERT IS BEING ISSUED BY THE CALIFORNIA HIGHWAY PATROL ON BEHALF OF THE LOS ANGELES POLICE DEPARTMENT.

ON APRIL 25, 2026, AT 7 00 PM, LEO SMITH WAS TAKEN FROM LOS ANGELES, CALIFORNIA.  LEO SMITH IS A 8 MONTH OLD BLACK MALE, 2 FEET 3 INCHES TALL, WEIGHING 20 POUNDS, WITH BLACK HAIR AND BROWN EYES.  LEO SMITH IS BELIEVED TO BE WEARING A YELLOW SHIRT AND DIAPER.

THE SUSPECT, TASHIANNA LEWIS, IS A 32 YEAR OLD BLACK FEMALE, STANDING 5 FEET 10 INCHES TALL, WEIGHING 320 POUNDS WITH BROWN HAIR AND BROWN EYES.  TASHIANNA LEWIS IS BELIEVED TO BE WEARING A BLUE SWEATSUIT.  

THE SUSPECT WAS LAST SEEN DRIVING A 2025 RED HYUNDAI ELANTRA, WITH CALIFORNIA LICENSE PLATE NUMBER 9 X E S 0 3 1.

IF SEEN CALL 9 1 1
